headline: Oil Advances as US and Iran Offer Conflicting Views on Talks
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Oil climbed as the US and Iran offered conflicting comments on efforts to end the war that’s shuttered the Strait of Hormuz, choked off crude production, and stoked concerns of a global energy crisis.With attacks continuing in countries across the region, Brent advanced near $106 a barrel, as West Texas Intermediate traded around $93. headline: Oil Advances as US and Iran Offer Conflicting Comments on Talks
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Oil climbed as the US and Iran offered conflicting comments on efforts to end the war that’s shuttered the Strait of Hormuz, choked off swathes of crude production, and stoked concerns of a global energy crisis.With attacks continuing in countries across the region, Brent advanced toward $105 a barrel after declining by more than 2% on Wednesday, as West Texas Intermediate traded near $93. headline: BlackRock’s Kapito Warns Investors Are Mispricing Iran Risks
summary: (Bloomberg) -- BlackRock Inc. President Rob Kapito said investors may be underestimating the risks stemming from the Iran war, which are likely to weigh on growth and drive inflation higher even if the conflict ends soon.Growth could be hit by as much as two percentage points, while inflation may rise by a similar margin even if the war ends shortly, warned Kapito at the Asia Pacific Financial and Innovation Symposium in Melbourne on Thursday.Oil may still spike to $150 a barrel even “if we anno

headline: How The Story On BlackRock (BLK) Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Their Targets
summary: Price targets on BlackRock have been nudged in both directions, ranging from trims such as US$1,235 from US$1,275 to fresh targets above US$1,200 and a Buy call at US$1,280. These moves reflect a split view among analysts, with some leaning on stronger recent results and conference commentary, while others focus on industry flow risks and near term execution questions. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets fit into the broader narrative and how to keep track of where...
